en.title: Classroom Discussion
en.prompt: I need you to help me memorize the noun explanation, after I type a noun, you will simulate 5 students in the class to generate their speeches about the noun. The discussion must be humorous, and easy to understand. My first term is [first discussion term]
en.remark: Utilize peer discussions to facilitate comprehension and enhance memory retention of the topic at hand. Contributed by @A380747.

metaDescription: Learning new terms? Simulate 5 students debating a noun humorously. Enhance memory through engaging discussions. Try it now.

faq.q: Do the five virtual students really have different views?
faq.a: The AI attempts different stances (support / oppose / neutral / angle A / angle B), but variety is limited, with 2-3 views often similar. To widen differences, append "each student has a clear persona: STEM rigorous / humanities romantic / business pragmatic, etc."

faq.q: How efficient is it for memorizing technical terms?
faq.a: More efficient than flashcards. Different characters' humorous discussion makes concept memory three-dimensional, and the brain retains contextual memory far better than abstract definitions. Before exam cramming, have the AI discuss 10-20 points at once; one pass equals two textbook readings.
